description_long: This is a modern, tactical rifle with a sleek, black finish and a streamlined, angular design. The rifle features a prominent upper rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and is equipped with a compact scope or red dot sight. The stock is integrated into the body in a bullpup configuration, placing the magazine and action behind the trigger for a shorter overall length. The barrel is relatively short and robust, with a smooth cylindrical profile and no visible muzzle device. The handguard and grip are ergonomically shaped, with the trigger guard extending into a pronounced pistol grip. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, designed for durability and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black tactical bullpup rifle with an integrated scope, ergonomic grip, and compact design. The rifle features a short barrel and a robust, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the bullpup stock, scope, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end and narrow profile, with the scope visible on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with clear visibility of the stock and scope.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the scope and rail system.
